tool.name: Analyzer

param.name: prompt
param.value: 45 to 60 nm Cu on 15 to 25 nm Ti on a silicon substrate, in dTHF (ambient medium). The incoming comes from the back (back reflection).
param.label: Prompt

param.name: config_json
param.label: JSON Configuration
param.help: A JSON file with run parameters including input_file, template_file, data_directory, and output_directory. Overrides the individual parameters above when provided.

configfiles.configfile:
import json, sys with open(sys.argv[1]) as f: d = json.load(f) with open('_env.sh', 'w') as f: f.write('export OUTPUT_DIR="%s"
' % d.get('output_directory', sys.argv[2])) f.write('export PROMPT="%s"
' % d.get('prompt', sys.argv[3])) f.write('export LLM_PROVIDER="%s"
' % d.get('llm_provider', sys.argv[4])) f.write('export LLM_MODEL="%s"
' % d.get('llm_model', sys.argv[5])) f.write('export LLM_BASE_URL="%s"
' % d.get('llm_base_url', sys.argv[6]))

tool.command: #if $config_json python '$parse_config_script' '$config_json' '$output_dir' '$prompt' '$llm_provider' '$llm_model' '$llm_base_url' && . _env.sh && #else export OUTPUT_DIR='$output_dir' && export PROMPT='$prompt' && export LLM_PROVIDER='$llm_provider' && export LLM_MODEL='$llm_model' && export LLM_BASE_URL='$llm_base_url' && #end if mkdir -p \$OUTPUT_DIR && ln -s \$OUTPUT_DIR output && aure analyze $reflectivity_file "\$PROMPT" -o ./output > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2) && LAST_ITER=`ls -d output/refl1d_output/fit_iter*_dream | sort -V | tail -n 1` && cp \$LAST_ITER/problem-1-exp*.json $output_model && tar -czvf $out_gz output
